description: Synthetic customer-support agent with five tools. Seeded failure: cancellation requests that mention billing/money/refund language may be misrouted to issue_refund instead of cancel_subscription. Originally the project's only scenario; retained as the sanity/integration/tutorial scenario.
regression_split_procedure: The original evals/regression.jsonl (25 cases) was split deterministically: within each expected_tool group, in original file order, the first ceil(0.4*n) cases go to regression_dev and the remainder to regression_final. The three IDs consumed by the prior live integration smoke (reg-refund-001, reg-refund-002, reg-refund-003) all fall within regression_dev. regression_final was never evaluated during the split.
provenance: Split files carry the original case IDs from the pre-scenario evals/ layout.
